evidence_label: branch-review response capture refresh, not treatment advice
pubmed_query: (transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia OR transfusion dependent thalassemia) AND (clinician decision OR eligibility OR gene therapy OR hematopoietic cell transplantation OR exagamglogene OR iron homeostasis OR cost-effectiveness) AND (2025:2026[dp])

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_hct
guideline_sources.role: supports allogeneic HCT as a specialist branch question, not a public eligibility label

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_gene_manipulation
guideline_sources.role: supports gene-cell therapy as a distinct branch question requiring expert review and follow-up context

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_transfusion
guideline_sources.role: supports transfusion burden and response labels before branch interpretation

guideline_sources.label: TIF_2025_iron_overload
guideline_sources.role: supports iron and organ-risk labels before branch interpretation

pubmed_records.title: Correction of ineffective erythropoiesis and normalization of iron homeostasis after exagamglogene autotemcel in transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia.
Cost-effectiveness of exagamglogene autotemcel gene-edited therapy in patients with transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia in the United States.
Exa-cel in children with transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia or sickle cell disease.
Best practices in gene therapy for sickle cell disease and transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia.
Current therapeutic landscape of beta-thalassemia: focus on gene therapy.
Improvements in health-related quality of life in patients with transfusion-dependent beta-thalassemia after exagamglogene autotemcel.
Experience with stem cell collection for children with transfusion-dependent thalassemia undergoing gene therapy.
Second allogeneic hematopoietic cell transplantation after graft failure is an effective curative option in children with hemoglobinopathies.
Clinical burden and healthcare resource utilization after allogeneic hematopoietic stem cell transplant for sickle cell disease or beta-thalassemia.

registry_records.label: ClinicalTrials.gov_TDT_gene_cell_search
registry_records.query: transfusion dependent beta thalassemia AND CTX001 OR exagamglogene OR gene therapy OR hematopoietic stem cell transplantation

decision_use: These sources support reducing clinician branch replies to public-safe labels. They do not support public diagnosis, eligibility, therapy selection, referral, trial screening, travel, import, purchase, dosing, transfusion changes, chelation changes, lab contact, private-message routing, or sample routing.
